name: Naman Sharma
title: DevOps & AI Enthusiast
introduction: Building scalable systems and intelligent solutions. Passionate about bridging the gap between development and operations with modern tooling and machine learning.
about: I'm a Computer Science student with a deep passion for DevOps practices and Artificial Intelligence. I enjoy automating workflows, building CI/CD pipelines, and developing machine learning models that solve real-world problems. My goal is to create robust, scalable systems that make a meaningful impact. When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, and sharing knowledge with the developer community.

projects.title: Traffic Sign Recognition System
projects.description: Deep learning model for traffic sign classification using CNN and TensorFlow. Achieved 95% accuracy on the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark dataset.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline Project
projects.description: Automated DevOps pipeline using GitHub Actions and Docker containers. Reduced deployment time by 60% with automated testing and containerized builds.

projects.title: Infrastructure Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time server monitoring dashboard with alerting system. Tracks CPU, memory, disk usage and sends notifications on threshold breaches.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis API
projects.description: REST API for text sentiment analysis using NLP techniques. Deployed as a containerized microservice with automated CI/CD.

experience.description: Studying software engineering, DevOps practices, and machine learning systems. Active participant in hackathons and coding competitions.
Contributing to open-source DevOps tools and ML libraries. Focused on improving documentation and adding new features.
Building automation scripts, CI/CD pipelines, and small ML projects for clients. Specializing in Python-based solutions.
